question: What was the performance of major U.S. stock indices on Thursday?
answer: The Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq all fell between 1% and 1.5%.
keypoints: Wall Street closed sharply lower on Thursday with the Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq all falling between 1% and 1.5%.

question: Why did Levi Strauss & Co. shares rise 12%?
answer: The apparel maker raised its annual profit forecast due to cost-cutting savings and fewer discounts.
keypoints: Levi Strauss & Co. shares jumped 12% after the apparel maker raised its annual profit forecast due to cost-cutting savings and fewer discounts.
